metadata.method_name: S_supervised: a PRECISION-PRESERVING SUPERVISED located_in extractor (calibrated GBDT over engineered per-pair features + a fine-tuned compact encoder, both trained DOC-DISJOINT on the gold distributi
metadata.step: Change ONLY the extraction step. The certificate engine (kinship.py forward least-fixpoint UNION closure, held_out direct-edge ablation) and ALL 6 confident-wrong competitors (4 dispersion signals + 2

headline_summary.decisive_boundary_synthesis: Decisive structural boundary. On the sibling-absent pool the query-side verifier's confident-wrong is FIXED at ~0.218 (it ignores the extracted graph). The certificate's sibling confident-wrong is FAR

gbdt.boundary_localization_verdict: INTRINSIC_PRESENT_ABSENT_CONFUSION: as recall rises, the certificate's sibling confident-wrong rises ~in lockstep with present coverage (d(sibling_cw)/d(recall)=1.174 vs d(present_cov)/d(recall)=1.169

encoder.boundary_localization_verdict: ACHIEVABLE_RECALL_LIMIT: present coverage rises with recall (d/dR=1.418) faster than sibling confident-wrong (d/dR=0.680, ratio=0.48); the binding limit is that realized atomic recall plateaus below t

headline_summary.one_line: A precision-preserving SUPERVISED located_in extractor (trained doc-disjoint on the gold distribution) feeds the frozen closure certificate at >=7 operating points; the fork verdict is NET-UTILITY-BOU

gold_read_ceiling.note: the gold-read certificate (closure over GOLD atomic edges, held_out direct edge ablated) deduces ~100% of present golds & abstains on ~100% of absent pairs by construction; the gap to the LLM-read cer

fork_verdict.rationale: No precision-preserving supervised operating point lifts the worst-case mixed-pool confident-wrong reduction above 0 against all 6 competitors. The gold-read ceiling (present_coverage/abstain/sel-acc

supervised_extractor_design.task: binary located_in(i,j) over ORDERED gold-entity pairs co-occurring within a 2-sentence window; cap 400 candidates/doc; the engine seeds the converse so only type='located_in' edges are emitted; direct
supervised_extractor_design.no_grounding_loss: the supervised extractor works DIRECTLY over gold entity_ids, so there is no LLM name-grounding step and no grounding recall loss (a structural advantage over the prompt-only PATH-2 extraction).
supervised_extractor_design.calibration: IsotonicRegression on a doc-disjoint within-train fold maps the score to a precision-monotone threshold.

families.gbdt: calibrated LightGBM/GradientBoosting over ~30 engineered per-pair features (cues, admin-level, appositive, substring, degree).
families.encoder: fine-tuned microsoft/deberta-v3-small over the marked text window [E1]..[/E1]/[E2]..[/E2] of the closest mention pair.

frontier_dominance_detail.note: at each overlapping prompt-only operating point the supervised frontier is interpolated to the same atomic recall; dominance = supervised has >= precision AND >= (less-negative) worst-case reduction C

frontier_slope_contrast.interpretation_finding: NET-UTILITY-BOUNDARY-STRUCTURAL. The supervised frontier DOMINATES the prompt-only frontier point-by-point (higher atomic precision AND a less-negative worst-case reduction at every matched recall) bu
frontier_slope_contrast.note: Worst-case (min over the 6 competitors) mixed-pool confident-wrong reduction CI-lower vs realized atomic recall over the supervised operating points, contrasted with iter-9's prompt-only frontier. A r

prompt_only_frontier_overlay_iter9.note: iter-9 prompt-only PATH-2 recall->net-utility frontier overlaid as the negative baseline.

snapshot_equality_vs_FROZEN8.note: competitor predict_*/metadata_conf_* fields compared to iter-8 FROZEN8 joined by (doc_id,qsrc,qtgt,is_absent). 0 mismatches => every competitor replayed byte-identical from the SHA-256 cache; only the

gold_read_ceiling_constant_upper_bound.note: the gold-read certificate (closure over GOLD atomic edges, held_out direct edge ablated) deduces ~100% of present golds & abstains on ~100% of absent pairs by construction; the gap to the LLM-read cer

leakage_guard.note: training docs are DOC-DISJOINT from the eval pool (the real guard); the label definition is identical train/eval so there is no label leakage. Fold = SHA-256(doc_id)%5.

worked_present_recovery.title: Aalborg County
worked_present_recovery.story: Aalborg County () is a former province in Denmark, located in north-eastern Jutland around the eastern approach to the Limfjord. Aalborg County was established in 1793 and abolished in 1970 when it me
worked_present_recovery.question: What is the geographic relationship of Aalborg to Denmark?
worked_present_recovery.s0_llm_read_certificate_decision: ABSTAIN (no_path) -- LLM extraction missed the connecting edge
worked_present_recovery.explanation: The prompt-only (iter-8/9) extractor missed >=1 connecting located_in edge so the certificate saw the endpoints as disconnected and ABSTAINED. The supervised extractor recovered the connecting edge(s)

worked_no_derivation_abstention_sibling.title: A Sầu Valley
worked_no_derivation_abstention_sibling.story: The A Shau Valley (Vietnamese: thung lũng A Sầu) is a valley in Vietnam's Thừa Thiên-Huế Province, west of the coastal city of Huế, along the border of Laos. The valley runs north and south for 40 kil
worked_no_derivation_abstention_sibling.question: What is the geographic relationship of thung lũng A Sầu to Route 548?
worked_no_derivation_abstention_sibling.explanation: The supervised extractor's located_in edges leave the two co-component SIBLINGS with NO directed containment path (located_in o contains is UNDEFINED), so the forward closure is EMPTY and the certific

honesty_caveats.natural_prose: input is genuinely-natural Wikipedia introductory prose (no templating/concatenation).
honesty_caveats.supervised_over_gold_entities: the supervised extractor classifies relations over GOLD entity-mention pairs (the entity set is given); it does NOT perform mention detection / NER. This isolates the relation-extraction recall the ce
honesty_caveats.recall_ceiling: atomic recall is capped by the locally-justifiable fraction (~0.588 on re-docred) plus the window; KB-implied non-local edges are not span-recoverable. The vs-locally-justifiable ceiling is reported p
honesty_caveats.matched_coverage_degeneracy: when present coverage is low the mixed matched-coverage reduction is throttled; the load-bearing objects are the per-tau natural sibling confident-wrong and the crux fraction-caught, exactly as in ite
honesty_caveats.prolog: swipl discharge falls back to python-checked and is labelled truthfully if swipl is unavailable.
honesty_caveats.gold_read_ceiling: 1.0/1.0/1.0 is the constant upper bound carried in every table; all headroom is in extraction.
